title: stelis floresii
intro: Stelis floresii, also known as the "orchid of the Andes", is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis floresii are thought to include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, Stelis floresii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
